text: The gross weight upon a solid tire upon a vehicle shall not exceed 600 pounds upon any inch of the channel base width of such tire.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 15. SIZE, WEIGHT, AND LOAD [35000 - 35796]
### Chapter 5. Weight [35550 - 35796]
#### Article 2. Tire Limits [35600 - 35601]
##### § 35600

The gross weight upon a solid tire upon a vehicle shall not exceed 600 pounds upon any inch of the channel base width of such tire.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: The gross weight upon a solid tire upon a vehicle shall not exceed 600 pounds upon any inch of the channel base width of such tire.
